[MMU VOLLEYBALL CLUB NEW MEMBER RECRUITMENT TRI JULY/AUGUST 2025]

Hey MMUians‼️

Are you ready to dig, set and spike your way into an amazing year ahead? Whether you’re completely new to volleyball or already an experienced player, MMU Volleyball Club (MMUVC) is the perfect place to grow, learn, and build lifelong friendships. 

👉 Haven’t renewed your membership yet? Don’t wait any longer—this is the time to do it and secure your spot with us!

👉 Not a member yet? No worries! Everyone is welcome, and we can’t wait to have fresh faces joining our volleyball family.

As a member, you’ll get the chance to:

▪️ Train and improve your volleyball skills
▪️ Join fun activities and tournaments
▪️ Be part of a supportive sports community
▪️ Create amazing memories on and off the court

Registration is open now! Don’t miss your chance, sign up through the link below:
https://forms.gle/t3pqqLMRhpC3De1s8

For any further inquiries, feel free to contact:
Ng Chuan Jie (President): +60 16-216 9099
Ang Yong En (Vice President): +60 12-761 3955

Thank you.

“Let’s serve, set and spike our way together”

Volleyball Club 2024/2025,
MMU Melaka.

[MMUVC NEW MEMBER RECRUITMENT TRI MAR/APR 2026]

MMU Volleyball Club (MMUVC) is looking for new members this new term!

If you love playing volleyball, or just want to try a new sport, come and join our fun and active sports group.

For old members: If you haven’t renewed your club membership, now is the best time to do it and stay with our team.

For new members: We welcome you warmly! You will join a friendly team, learn volleyball skills, play together with teammates, and make great memories here.

What you can get as a club member:
• Join regular volleyball trainings
• Take part in casual matches and small tournaments
• Get better at volleyball with our team’s help
• Have fun with other members and enjoy team activities

Want to join us?
Come to our club booth at CLC Concourse!
Time: 10.00am - 6.00pm, 14-15 April 2026
You can meet our team members, ask any questions, and sign up right there.

Important notice: Online membership registration will take place on 16 April 2026.

Membership Registration & Renewal Form:
https://forms.gle/ZnCuHcJvzscFfcXg8

For any further inquiries, feel free to contact:
Ng Chuan Jie (President): +60 16-216 9099
Ang Yong En (Vice President): +60 12-761 3955

Thank you.

[MMU VOLLEYBALL CLUB NEW MEMBER RECRUITMENT TRI OCT/NOV 2025]

The MMU Volleyball Club (MMUVC) is officially opening its membership for the new term! Whether you’re passionate about volleyball or simply looking to try something new, this is the perfect opportunity to join a vibrant and energetic sports community. 🌟

If you haven’t renewed your membership yet, now is the ideal time to stay connected with the club and continue your journey with us. For new members, we welcome you to be part of a supportive environment where you’ll grow your skills, build teamwork, and create unforgettable moments.

As a member of MMUVC, you’ll be able to:
▪️Participate in regular training sessions
▪️Join friendly matches and tournaments
▪️Improve your skills with a supportive team
▪️Enjoy fun activities and a strong community spirit

Interested in joining our journey?
Come visit us at our booth at CLC Concourse on 3–4 December 2025, from 10.00am to 6.00pm! Meet the team, ask questions, and even register on the spot.

*Please note that on 5 December 2025, registration will be conducted online only.

Membership Registration & Renewal Form: 
https://forms.gle/H598dmQ7sApowq7s8

For any further inquiries, feel free to contact:
Ng Chuan Jie (President): +60 16-216 9099
Ang Yong En (Vice President): +60 12-761 3955

Thank you.
